      path: /tenants/{tenantId}
      purpose: Inspect tenant identity, lifecycle status, domain, owner activation
        state, and operational metadata.
    - id: tenant_provisioning
      path: /tenants/{tenantId}/provisioning
      purpose: Inspect tenant provisioning job state, steps, failures, retries, and
        activation invite state.
    - id: tenant_database
      path: /tenants/{tenantId}/database
      purpose: Inspect tenant database registry record, schema version, and schema
        job status.
    - id: tenant_users
      path: /tenants/{tenantId}/users
      purpose: Inspect tenant owner activation state and tenant user metadata visible
        to the platform owner.
    - id: jobs
      path: /jobs
      purpose: List platform provisioning and tenant schema change jobs.
    - id: job_detail
      path: /jobs/{jobId}
      purpose: Inspect one job, its steps, failure state, retry eligibility, and audit
        trail.
    - id: audit
      path: /audit
      purpose: Inspect platform-level audit records.
    - id: settings
      path: /settings
      purpose: Manage platform-level settings.
    - id: health
      path: /health
      purpose: Expose platform health status.
  surface_rules:
  - id: PCP-001
    rule: The platform control plane MUST NOT expose tenant operational workflows.
  - id: PCP-002
    rule: The platform control plane MUST NOT provide menu, order, station, checkout,
      or customer session management for a tenant.
  - id: PCP-003
    rule: The platform control plane MAY inspect tenant lifecycle, provisioning, schema,
      activation, audit, and health metadata.
  - id: PCP-004
    rule: The platform control plane MUST be served only from platform.iotables.net.
  - id: PCP-005
    rule: Platform routes MUST use platform API routes under /api/platform/**.
  - id: PCP-006
    rule: The platform control plane MUST use a Workspace-centric SaaS layout consisting of a three-pane view (Left Navigation Sidebar, Middle Master Grid/List, and Right Contextual Inspector Panel) to maximize context preservation and prevent full-page reloads.
  - id: PCP-007
    rule: The Right Contextual Inspector Panel MUST display all selected tenant-specific details (Overview, Lifecycle, Provisioning, Database, Owner Activation, Jobs, Audit, and Health) using in-panel horizontal tab navigation to ensure a unified master-detail interface.
  - id: PCP-008
    rule: Form submissions and interactive creation processes (such as Tenant Creation) MUST be built as overlay modal dialogs or multi-step onboarding wizards instead of separate full-page routes to retain parent view context.
  - id: PCP-009
    rule: The platform control plane navigation and right-drawer states MUST be URL-aware (via query parameters or route interception) so that deep-linking and browser history support work seamlessly.
  - id: PCP-010
    rule: A global keyboard-accessible Command Palette (Ctrl+K / Cmd+K) MUST be integrated to allow platform owners to instantly search and switch between tenants, jobs, or settings pages.
  dashboard_metrics:
    purpose: Show only operationally actionable platform state.
    forbidden_metric_types:
    - vanity_metric
    - decorative_chart
    - tenant_business_revenue
    - tenant_order_volume
    - tenant_customer_behavior
    cards:
    - id: total_tenants
      label: Total tenants
      source: tenant_registry
      action_target: /tenants
      severity: info
    - id: active_tenants
      label: Active tenants
      source: tenant_registry.status.active
      action_target: /tenants?status=active
      severity: info
    - id: pending_activation_tenants
      label: Pending activation
      source: tenant_registry.status.pending_activation
      action_target: /tenants?status=pending_activation
      severity: warning
    - id: suspended_tenants
      label: Suspended tenants
      source: tenant_registry.status.suspended
      action_target: /tenants?status=suspended
      severity: warning
    - id: failed_provisioning_jobs
      label: Failed provisioning jobs
      source: tenant_provisioning_jobs.status.failed
      action_target: /jobs?type=provisioning&status=failed
      severity: critical
    - id: running_provisioning_jobs
      label: Running provisioning jobs
      source: tenant_provisioning_jobs.status.running
      action_target: /jobs?type=provisioning&status=running
      severity: info
    - id: failed_schema_jobs
      label: Failed schema jobs
      source: tenant_schema_change_jobs.status.failed
      action_target: /jobs?type=schema_change&status=failed
      severity: critical
    - id: tenant_schema_drift
      label: Tenants not on latest schema
      source: tenant_database_registry.schema_version_not_latest
      action_target: /jobs?type=schema_change
      severity: warning
    - id: platform_health
      label: Platform health
      source: health.platform
      action_target: /health
      severity: critical_when_unhealthy
    - id: database_health
      label: Database health
      source: health.database
      action_target: /health
      severity: critical_when_unhealthy
    - id: background_job_health
      label: Background job health
      source: health.background_jobs
      action_target: /health
      severity: critical_when_unhealthy
    lists:
    - id: recent_failed_jobs
      label: Recent failed jobs
      max_items: 10
      source: jobs.status.failed.order_by_updated_desc
      action_target: /jobs/{jobId}
      empty_state: No failed jobs.
    - id: recent_platform_audit_events
      label: Recent platform audit events
      max_items: 10
      source: platform_audit_log.order_by_created_desc
      action_target: /audit
      empty_state: No platform audit events.
    - id: tenants_requiring_attention
      label: Tenants requiring attention
      max_items: 10
      source: tenant_registry.attention_required
      action_target: /tenants/{tenantId}
      empty_state: No tenants require attention.
    rules:
    - Dashboard metrics MUST be actionable.
    - Dashboard MUST NOT show tenant order volume, tenant revenue, customer behavior,
      or tenant operational analytics.
    - Every dashboard card MUST link to a concrete investigation or action route.
    - Critical states MUST be visually distinguishable from informational states.
    - Dashboard empty states MUST be explicit and non-alarming.
  tenant_detail_screen:
    purpose: Inspect one tenant's platform-owned lifecycle, provisioning, database,
      activation, jobs, audit, and health state without entering tenant operations.
    route: /tenants/{tenantId}
    tabs:
    - id: overview
      label: Overview
      purpose: Show tenant identity and current platform lifecycle state.
      fields:
      - tenant_id
      - tenant_display_name
      - tenant_slug
      - tenant_domain
      - tenant_status
      - business_type
      - default_locale
      - default_currency
      - timezone
      - created_at
      - created_by_platform_user_id
    - id: lifecycle
      label: Lifecycle
      purpose: Show lifecycle status and allowed platform lifecycle actions.
      actions:
      - suspend_tenant
      - reactivate_tenant
      - deactivate_tenant
      rules:
      - Lifecycle actions MUST require a reason.
      - Lifecycle actions MUST create platform audit records.
    - id: provisioning
      label: Provisioning
      purpose: Show tenant provisioning job, steps, failures, and retry eligibility.
      fields:
      - latest_provisioning_job_id
      - latest_provisioning_job_status
      - current_step
      - failed_step
      - failure_message
      - retry_eligible
      - last_retry_at
    - id: database
      label: Database
      purpose: Show tenant database registry and schema state.
      fields:
      - tenant_database_name
      - database_status
      - current_schema_version
      - latest_schema_version
      - schema_drift
      - last_schema_job_id
      - connection_health
    - id: owner_activation
      label: Owner activation
      purpose: Show tenant owner activation state.
      fields:
      - tenant_owner_full_name
      - tenant_owner_email
      - activation_status
      - activation_invite_expires_at
      - activated_at
      actions:
      - resend_activation_invite
    - id: jobs
      label: Jobs
      purpose: Show jobs scoped to this tenant.
      job_types:
      - provisioning
      - schema_change
      filters:
      - status
      - job_type
      - created_at
    - id: audit
      label: Audit
      purpose: Show platform audit events related to this tenant.
      event_scope: tenant_related_platform_audit_events
    - id: health
      label: Health
      purpose: Show tenant platform-level health signals.
      checks:
      - tenant_domain_reachable
      - tenant_database_reachable
      - tenant_api_ready
      - tenant_schema_current
    - id: danger_zone
      label: Danger zone
      purpose: Group critical lifecycle actions requiring explicit confirmation.
      actions:
      - suspend_tenant
      - deactivate_tenant
      rules:
      - Danger zone actions MUST require reason input.
      - Danger zone actions MUST require explicit confirmation.
      - Danger zone actions MUST create platform audit records.
    forbidden_content:
    - tenant_menu_management
    - tenant_order_management
    - tenant_station_operation
    - tenant_checkout_operation
    - tenant_customer_session_management
    rules:
    - Tenant detail MUST stay platform-scoped.
    - Tenant detail MUST NOT become a tenant operations dashboard.
    - Tenant detail tabs MUST be minimal and investigation-oriented.
    - Tenant detail actions MUST link to lifecycle, provisioning, schema, activation,
      jobs, audit, or health behavior only.
  platform_tenant_creation_input_policy:
    manual_input_level: minimal
    system_generation_level: strict
    tenant_slug: editable_before_creation_only
    database_name: system_generated_only
    domain: system_generated_only
    manual_inputs:
    - id: tenant_display_name
      required: true
      type: string
      example: Kahve Duragi Alsancak
      purpose: Human-readable tenant name.
    - id: tenant_slug
      required: false
      type: slug
      example: kahve-duragi-alsancak
      purpose: Tenant subdomain label. If omitted, the system proposes and generates
        it from tenant_display_name.
      edit_rule: May be edited only before tenant creation is confirmed.
    - id: tenant_owner_full_name
      required: true
      type: string
      purpose: Initial tenant owner full name.
    - id: tenant_owner_email
      required: true
      type: email
      purpose: Initial tenant owner activation and login email.
    - id: tenant_owner_phone
      required: false
      type: phone
      purpose: Optional tenant owner phone number.
    - id: business_type
      required: true
      type: enum
      allowed_values:
      - cafe
      - restaurant
      - fast_casual
      - food_court
      - bar_pub
      - other
      purpose: Tenant business category.
    - id: default_locale
      required: true
      type: locale
      default: tr-TR
      purpose: Default tenant locale.
    - id: default_currency
      required: true
      type: currency_code
      default: TRY
      purpose: Default tenant currency.
    - id: timezone
      required: true
      type: iana_timezone
      default: Europe/Istanbul
      purpose: Tenant default timezone.
    - id: initial_plan
      required: true
      type: enum
      default: standard
      allowed_values:
      - standard
      purpose: Initial platform plan assigned to the tenant.
    - id: notes
      required: false
      type: string
      purpose: Optional platform owner note.
    system_generated_values:
    - id: tenant_id
      generation: uuid
      editable_by_platform_owner: false
    - id: tenant_slug
      generation: normalized_unique_slug_from_display_name_when_not_manually_provided
      editable_by_platform_owner: before_creation_only
    - id: tenant_domain
      generation: '{tenantSlug}.iotables.net'
      editable_by_platform_owner: false
    - id: tenant_database_name
      generation: iotable_tenant_{tenantSlug}
      editable_by_platform_owner: false
    - id: tenant_status
      generation: draft_then_provisioning_then_pending_activation
      editable_by_platform_owner: false
    - id: provisioning_job_id
      generation: uuid
      editable_by_platform_owner: false
    - id: database_connection_metadata
      generation: system_generated
      editable_by_platform_owner: false
    - id: activation_invite_token
      generation: secure_random_token
      editable_by_platform_owner: false
    - id: tenant_owner_activation_url
      generation: system_generated_activation_url
      editable_by_platform_owner: false
    - id: created_at
      generation: system_time
      editable_by_platform_owner: false
    - id: created_by_platform_user_id
      generation: current_authenticated_platform_user
      editable_by_platform_owner: false
    - id: audit_record
      generation: tenant_created
      editable_by_platform_owner: false
  create_flow:
  - step: 1
    id: enter_tenant_identity
    actor: platform_owner
    result: Platform owner enters tenant display name and tenant owner information.
  - step: 2
    id: propose_slug
    actor: system
    result: System proposes a tenant slug from the tenant display name.
  - step: 3
    id: confirm_or_edit_slug
    actor: platform_owner
    result: Platform owner confirms or edits the proposed tenant slug before creation.
  - step: 4
    id: validate_slug
    actor: system
    result: System validates slug format and global uniqueness.
  - step: 5
    id: derive_domain_and_database_name
    actor: system
    result: System derives tenant domain and tenant database name.
  - step: 6
    id: confirm_creation
    actor: platform_owner
    result: Platform owner confirms tenant creation.
  - step: 7
    id: create_tenant_record
    actor: system
    result: System creates the tenant registry record.
  - step: 8
    id: start_provisioning_job
    actor: system
    result: System starts the tenant provisioning job.
  - step: 9
    id: create_tenant_database
    actor: system
    result: System creates the dedicated tenant database.
  - step: 10
    id: apply_schema_and_seed
    actor: system
    result: System applies the current tenant schema and required seed data.
  - step: 11
    id: create_owner_activation_invite
    actor: system
    result: System creates the tenant owner activation invite.
  - step: 12
    id: set_pending_activation
    actor: system
    result: Tenant status becomes pending_activation.
  validation_rules:
  - id: TCV-001
    rule: Tenant display name is required.
  - id: TCV-002
    rule: Tenant owner full name is required.
  - id: TCV-003
    rule: Tenant owner email is required and MUST be a valid email address.
  - id: TCV-004
    rule: Tenant slug MUST contain only lowercase ascii letters, digits, and hyphens.
  - id: TCV-005
    rule: Tenant slug MUST be globally unique.
  - id: TCV-006
    rule: Tenant slug MUST NOT be editable after tenant creation is confirmed.
  - id: TCV-007
    rule: Tenant domain MUST be derived from tenant slug.
  - id: TCV-008
    rule: Tenant database name MUST be derived from tenant slug.
  - id: TCV-009
    rule: Platform owner MUST NOT manually enter tenant database name.
  - id: TCV-010
    rule: Platform owner MUST NOT manually enter tenant id, provisioning job id, activation
      token, or connection metadata.
  - id: TCV-011
    rule: Default locale, currency, timezone, and initial plan MUST have explicit
      values at creation time.
  open_decisions: []
  done_when:
  - platform_scope_boundary_is_defined
  - platform_routes_are_defined
  - platform_dashboard_metrics_are_defined
  - tenant_detail_tabs_are_defined
  - tenant_detail_platform_scope_is_enforced
  - tenant_creation_manual_inputs_are_defined
  - tenant_creation_system_generated_values_are_defined
  - tenant_creation_flow_is_defined
  - tenant_creation_validation_rules_are_defined
  - open_platform_control_plane_decisions_are_recorded
platform_provisioning_retry:
  purpose:
    rule: Define platform owner behavior for failed tenant provisioning jobs and provisioning
      retry UI behavior.
    audience:
    - platform_owner
    applies_to:
    - platform_dashboard
    - tenant_detail.provisioning
    - jobs
    - job_detail
    - platform_audit
  provisioning_retry_policy:
    retry_model: manual_retry_from_failed_step
    automatic_retry: false
    retry_actor: platform_owner
    retry_requires_reason: true
    retry_creates_audit_record: true
    retry_starts_from: failed_step
    retry_preserves_completed_steps: true
    retry_limit: 3
    after_retry_limit: manual_intervention_required
    rules:
    - Provisioning retry MUST NOT be automatic.
    - Only platform_owner MAY retry a failed provisioning job.
    - Retry MUST start from the failed step.
    - Completed provisioning steps MUST NOT be re-executed.
    - Retry MUST require a platform_owner-provided reason.
    - Every retry attempt MUST create a platform audit record.
    - A provisioning job MUST allow at most 3 retry attempts.
    - After the retry limit is reached, the job MUST become manual_intervention_required.
  provisioning_steps:
  - id: create_tenant_record
    retryable: false
    reason: Tenant registry record is the initiating record and MUST NOT be duplicated.
  - id: reserve_tenant_domain
    retryable: true
    idempotency_required: true
  - id: create_tenant_database
    retryable: true
    idempotency_required: true
  - id: apply_tenant_schema
    retryable: true
    idempotency_required: true
  - id: seed_tenant_database
    retryable: true
    idempotency_required: true
  - id: create_owner_activation_invite
    retryable: true
    idempotency_required: true
  - id: set_pending_activation
    retryable: true
    idempotency_required: true
  job_status_model:
    statuses:
    - queued
    - running
    - failed
    - retrying
    - completed
    - manual_intervention_required
    terminal_statuses:
    - completed
    - manual_intervention_required
    retryable_statuses:
    - failed
    non_retryable_statuses:
    - queued
    - running
    - retrying
    - completed
    - manual_intervention_required
  platform_ui_behavior:
    dashboard:
      failed_provisioning_jobs_card:
        visible_when_count_greater_than_zero: true
        action_target: /jobs?type=provisioning&status=failed
        severity: critical
    tenant_detail_provisioning_tab:
      required_fields:
      - latest_provisioning_job_id
      - latest_provisioning_job_status
      - current_step
      - failed_step
      - failure_message
      - retry_attempt_count
      - retry_limit
      - retry_eligible
      - last_retry_at
      - manual_intervention_required
      retry_action:
        label: Retry from failed step
        visible_when: latest_provisioning_job_status_is_failed_and_retry_attempt_count_below_limit
        requires_reason: true
        confirmation_required: true
    job_detail_screen:
      required_sections:
      - job_summary
      - step_timeline
      - failure_details
      - retry_history
      - audit_trail
      retry_action:
        label: Retry from failed step
        requires_reason: true
        confirmation_required: true
  retry_execution_rules:
    atomicity:
      rule: Retry state transition MUST be atomic.
      required_transition: failed_to_retrying
    idempotency:
      rule: Every retryable provisioning step MUST be idempotent.
    concurrency:
      rules:
      - Only one retry attempt MAY run for the same provisioning job at a time.
      - Concurrent retry requests for the same job MUST be rejected.
    completed_step_handling:
      rule: The retry executor MUST skip completed steps and resume at the failed
        step.
    failure_handling:
      rules:
      - If retry fails, the job status MUST return to failed unless retry_limit is
        reached.
      - If retry_limit is reached, the job status MUST become manual_intervention_required.
  platform_audit_events:
  - id: tenant_provisioning_retry_requested
    actor: platform_owner
    required_fields:
    - tenant_id
    - job_id
    - failed_step
    - retry_attempt_number
    - reason
    - created_at
  - id: tenant_provisioning_retry_started
    actor: system
    required_fields:
    - tenant_id
    - job_id
    - start_step
    - created_at
  - id: tenant_provisioning_retry_completed
    actor: system
    required_fields:
    - tenant_id
    - job_id
    - created_at
  - id: tenant_provisioning_retry_failed
    actor: system
    required_fields:
    - tenant_id
    - job_id
    - failed_step
    - failure_message
    - created_at
  - id: tenant_provisioning_manual_intervention_required
    actor: system
    required_fields:
    - tenant_id
    - job_id
    - reason
    - created_at
  forbidden_behavior:
  - automatic_retry
  - retry_from_beginning_by_default
  - reexecuting_completed_steps
  - retry_without_reason
  - retry_without_audit
  - silent_retry
  open_decisions: []
  done_when:
  - manual_retry_from_failed_step_is_defined
  - automatic_retry_is_forbidden
  - retry_actor_is_defined
  - retry_reason_requirement_is_defined
  - retry_limit_is_defined
  - provisioning_steps_are_defined
  - job_status_model_is_defined
  - platform_ui_behavior_is_defined
  - retry_execution_rules_are_defined
  - platform_audit_events_are_defined
platform_settings_catalog:
  purpose:
    rule: Define the editable and read-only platform settings exposed in the platform
      control plane.
    audience:
    - platform_owner
    route: /settings
  settings_policy:
    mode: minimal_editable_settings
    rules:
    - Only operational defaults MAY be editable from platform settings.
    - System identity, tenancy patterns, architecture decisions, authentication stack,
      and QR security constants MUST be read-only.
    - Editable settings MUST have explicit validation rules.
    - Every settings change MUST create a platform audit record.
    - Settings MUST NOT change existing tenant infrastructure identifiers retroactively.
  editable_settings:
  - id: default_locale
    type: locale
    default: tr-TR
    validation: must_be_supported_locale
    applies_to: new_tenant_creation_default
    retroactive: false
  - id: default_currency
    type: currency_code
    default: TRY
    validation: must_be_supported_currency_code
    applies_to: new_tenant_creation_default
    retroactive: false
  - id: default_timezone
    type: iana_timezone
    default: Europe/Istanbul
    validation: must_be_valid_iana_timezone
    applies_to: new_tenant_creation_default
    retroactive: false
  - id: tenant_owner_activation_invite_ttl_hours
    type: integer
    default: 72
    minimum: 1
    maximum: 168
    validation: must_be_between_minimum_and_maximum
    applies_to: new_activation_invites
    retroactive: false
  - id: provisioning_retry_limit
    type: integer
    default: 3
    minimum: 0
    maximum: 10
    validation: must_be_between_minimum_and_maximum
    applies_to: new_or_failed_provisioning_jobs
    retroactive: false
  read_only_settings:
  - id: platform_domain
    value: platform.iotables.net
    reason: Platform domain is part of the deployment and route namespace contract.
  - id: tenant_domain_pattern
    value: '{tenant}.iotables.net'
    reason: Tenant domain pattern is part of the tenancy contract.
  - id: tenant_database_name_pattern
    value: iotable_tenant_{tenantSlug}
    reason: Tenant database naming is part of the tenant isolation contract.
  - id: platform_database_name
    value: iotable_platform
    reason: Platform database name is part of the deployment and data ownership contract.
  - id: qr_rotation_interval_seconds
    value: 60
    reason: QR rotation interval is part of the customer presence security model.
  - id: architecture_style
    value: modular_monolith
    reason: Architecture style is a specification decision, not a runtime setting.
  - id: auth_identity_store
    value: FastAPI Users & SQLAlchemy
    reason: Authentication stack is a system architecture decision.
  - id: auth_oidc_oauth_server
    value: OAuth2 Password Flow (JWT)
    reason: Authentication stack is a system architecture decision.
  - id: database_engine
    value: PostgreSQL 17
    reason: Database engine is a technology stack decision.
  settings_ui:
    sections:
    - id: tenant_defaults
      label: Tenant defaults
      editable_settings:
      - default_locale
      - default_currency
      - default_timezone
    - id: activation
      label: Activation
      editable_settings:
      - tenant_owner_activation_invite_ttl_hours
    - id: provisioning
      label: Provisioning
      editable_settings:
      - provisioning_retry_limit
    - id: system_contracts
      label: System contracts
      read_only_settings:
      - platform_domain
      - tenant_domain_pattern
      - tenant_database_name_pattern
      - platform_database_name
      - qr_rotation_interval_seconds
      - architecture_style
      - auth_identity_store
      - auth_oidc_oauth_server
      - database_engine
    rules:
    - Read-only settings MUST be visibly read-only in the UI.
    - Read-only settings MUST explain why they cannot be edited.
    - Editable setting changes MUST require explicit save action.
    - Editable setting changes MUST show validation errors before submission.
  platform_audit_events:
  - id: platform_setting_updated
    actor: platform_owner
    required_fields:
    - setting_id
    - old_value
    - new_value
    - created_at
  - id: platform_setting_update_rejected
    actor: system
    required_fields:
    - setting_id
    - attempted_value
    - reason
    - created_at
  forbidden_behavior:
  - editing_tenant_domain_pattern_from_ui
  - editing_tenant_database_name_pattern_from_ui
  - editing_platform_database_name_from_ui
  - editing_qr_rotation_interval_from_ui
  - editing_auth_stack_from_ui
  - retroactively_mutating_existing_tenant_identifiers
  open_decisions: []
  done_when:
  - settings_policy_is_defined
  - editable_settings_are_defined
  - read_only_settings_are_defined
  - settings_ui_sections_are_defined
  - settings_audit_events_are_defined
  - forbidden_settings_behavior_is_defined
tenant_setup_console:
  purpose:
    rule: Define the tenant setup console, guided setup flow, default tenant seed
      tables and station, menu setup, staff setup, table device setup, operation activation
      requirements, business profile defaults, operating defaults, and setup ownership
      rules.
    applies_to:
    - tenant_setup_console
    - tenant_owner_activation
    - tenant_initial_configuration
    - tenant_operations_activation
    - tenant_default_seed_data
  surface:
    id: tenant_setup_console
    frontend_app: tenant_web
    route_family: https://{tenant}.iotables.net/console/**
    api_family: https://{tenant}.iotables.net/api/internal/**
    allowed_roles:
    - tenant_owner
    - tenant_admin
    - tenant_manager
    required_permissions:
      view: tenant.setup.view
      complete: tenant.setup.complete
    rules:
    - Tenant setup console MUST be served only from the tenant domain.
    - Tenant setup console MUST NOT be served from platform.iotables.net.
    - Tenant setup console MUST use tenant internal APIs.
    - Tenant setup console MUST NOT use platform APIs.
    - Tenant setup console MUST require authenticated tenant staff access.
  tenant_setup_flow:
    style: guided_setup_wizard
    first_login_behavior: tenant_owner_is_directed_to_setup_wizard_after_activation
    operations_dashboard_available_before_activation: false
    resume_supported: true
    partial_save_supported: true
    rules:
    - Tenant owner activation MUST complete before tenant setup can be completed.
    - A tenant with incomplete setup MUST show the guided setup wizard to authorized
      setup users.
    - Setup progress MUST be persisted.
    - Setup wizard MUST be resumable.
    - Tenant operations MUST NOT be activated until required setup gates pass.
  business_profile_defaults:
    business_type_default: cafe
    default_currency: TRY
    default_timezone: Europe/Istanbul
    allowed_business_types:
    - cafe
    - restaurant
    - bar
    - food_court_vendor
    - cloud_kitchen
    - other
    required_fields:
    - business_display_name
    - business_type
    - default_currency
    - default_timezone
    optional_fields:
    - business_legal_name
    - phone
    - address
    - logo
    rules:
    - Business display name MUST be provided before operations activation.
    - Business type MUST use an allowed value.
    - Default currency MUST default to TRY.
    - Default timezone MUST default to Europe/Istanbul.
    - Business legal name MUST be optional.
    - Logo MUST be optional.
  operating_defaults:
    default_service_mode: dine_in
    allowed_service_modes:
    - dine_in
    default_tax_display_mode: tax_included
    allowed_tax_display_modes:
    - tax_included
    - tax_excluded
    opening_hours_required: false
    service_charge_required: false
    fiscal_meaning: false
    rules:
    - Initial product version MUST support dine_in as the only service mode.
    - Delivery, pickup, takeaway, and room-service service modes MUST NOT be enabled
      in the initial product version.
    - Default tax display mode MUST be tax_included.
    - Tax display mode controls price presentation only.
    - Tax display mode MUST NOT imply fiscal device, e-invoice, e-archive, tax filing,
      or payment collection support.
    - Opening hours MUST be optional.
    - Service charge MUST be optional.
  table_model:
    canonical_identifier: table_id
    tenant_visible_identifier: table_number
    table_code: tenant_visible_unique_code
    allowed_types:
    - operational
    - system_test
    allowed_statuses:
    - active
    - disabled
    create_fields:
      required:
      - table_number
      - has_qr_device
      optional:
      - display_name
      - area_or_section
      - seat_capacity
    rules:
    - table_id MUST be system-generated and used as the canonical technical identifier.
    - table_number MUST be unique within a tenant.
    - table_number MUST be visible to tenant staff and customers.
    - Operational customer tables MUST use type operational.
    - Default test tables 000 and 999 MUST use type system_test.
    - Disabled tables MUST NOT accept new customer ordering sessions.
    - Table creation MUST explicitly capture whether the table has an ESP32 QR display
      device.
  station_model:
    canonical_identifier: station_id
    tenant_visible_identifier: station_code
    allowed_station_types:
    - kitchen
    - bar
    - coffee
    - dessert
    - service
    - other
    allowed_statuses:
    - active
    - disabled
    create_fields:
      required:
      - station_code
      - display_name
      - station_type
      optional:
      - sort_order
    rules:
    - station_id MUST be system-generated and used as the canonical technical identifier.
    - station_code MUST be unique within a tenant.
    - display_name MUST be provided for every station.
    - station_type MUST use an allowed value.
    - Disabled stations MUST NOT receive new station tickets.
  default_seed_station:
    created_for_every_tenant: true
    source: tenant_provisioning_seed
    station_code: MAIN
    display_name: Main Station
    station_type: kitchen
    status: active
    can_be_renamed: true
    can_be_disabled_after_another_active_station_exists: true
    rules:
    - Every tenant MUST receive an active MAIN station during tenant provisioning.
    - MAIN station MUST be usable for initial menu item routing.
    - MAIN station MUST count toward the required minimum active station activation
      gate.
    - Tenant users MAY rename MAIN station.
    - Tenant users MAY disable MAIN station only when at least one other active station
      exists.
  menu_category_model:
    canonical_identifier: category_id
    create_fields:
      required:
      - name
      optional:
      - description
      - sort_order
    allowed_statuses:
    - active
    - disabled
    rules:
    - category_id MUST be system-generated and used as the canonical technical identifier.
    - Category name MUST be provided.
    - Disabled categories MUST NOT appear in the customer menu.
    - Menu items under a disabled category MUST NOT appear in the customer menu.
  menu_item_model:
    canonical_identifier: item_id
    create_fields:
      required:
      - category_id
      - name
      - image
      optional:
      - description
      - sort_order
    orderable_item_required_fields:
    - price
    - station_id
    - image
    allowed_statuses:
    - active
    - disabled
    orderable_flag: true
    non_orderable_visible_items:
      allowed: true
      customer_menu_visibility: true
      add_to_cart_allowed: false
      display_badges:
      - unavailable
      - coming_soon
    price:
      currency: TRY
      type: decimal
    unsupported_in_initial_version:
    - variants
    - modifiers
    - option_groups
    - portion_sizes
    - extra_ingredients
    - stock_tracking
    rules:
    - item_id MUST be system-generated and used as the canonical technical identifier.
    - Menu item name MUST be provided.
    - Menu item image MUST be provided.
    - Orderable menu item price MUST be provided.
    - Orderable menu item station routing MUST be provided.
    - Orderable menu item image MUST be provided.
    - Disabled menu items MUST NOT appear in the customer menu.
    - Active non-orderable menu items MAY appear in the customer menu but MUST NOT
      be addable to cart.
    - Menu item price MUST be stored as TRY decimal in the initial product version.
    - Variants, modifiers, option groups, portion sizes, extra ingredients, and stock
      tracking MUST NOT be supported in the initial product version.
  station_routing_policy:
    routing_level: menu_item
    one_orderable_item_routes_to: one_station
    station_required_when_orderable: true
    rules:
    - Every orderable menu item MUST route to exactly one active station.
    - A menu item routed to a disabled station MUST NOT be orderable.
    - Station routing MUST be validated before operations activation.
    - Station routing MUST be revalidated before order submission.
  staff_setup:
    required_for_operations_activation: false
    setup_step_can_be_skipped: true
    ui_model: preset_driven_invitation_form
    invitation_fields:
      required:
      - display_name
      - email
      - role
      optional:
      - phone
      - station_assignment
    role_selection:
      control: dropdown
      source: fixed_tenant_role_catalog
      allowed_roles:
      - tenant_admin
      - tenant_manager
      - cashier
      - floor_staff
      - station_operator
      - accountant
    common_staff_presets:
    - id: manager
      label: Manager
      default_role: tenant_manager
    - id: cashier
      label: Cashier
      default_role: cashier
    - id: floor_staff
      label: Floor Staff
      default_role: floor_staff
    - id: station_operator
      label: Station Operator
      default_role: station_operator
      station_assignment_recommended: true
    - id: accountant
      label: Accountant
      default_role: accountant
    quick_add_behavior:
      allow_multiple_rows: true
      allow_preset_selection: true
      allow_role_dropdown_change: true
      send_invites_after_save: true
      allow_skip_step: true
    rules:
    - Staff setup MUST remain optional for operations activation.
    - Tenant setup console MUST provide preset-driven staff invitation.
    - Role selection MUST use fixed tenant role dropdown values.
    - Tenant owner role MUST NOT be assignable from the staff setup quick-add form.
    - Platform roles MUST NOT be assignable from tenant staff setup.
    - Station assignment MAY be recommended for station_operator invites.
    - Staff invitation MUST respect tenant.staff.invite and tenant.staff.assign_roles
      permissions.
  device_setup:
    required_for_operations_activation: false
    setup_step_can_be_skipped: true
    primary_model: table_specific_firmware_generation
    canonical_specification: specs/04_application_contracts.yaml
    table_creation_behavior:
      field: has_qr_device
      if_true:
      - system_generates_device_id
      - system_generates_device_secret
      - system_generates_ws_identity
      - system_generates_table_device_config
      - system_generates_table_specific_firmware_ino
      if_false:
      - no_esp32_device_identity_required
      - customer_self_ordering_via_table_qr_disabled
      - staff_pda_ordering_enabled
    firmware_download:
      artifact_is_secret: true
      allowed_roles:
      - tenant_owner
      - tenant_admin
      audit_required: true
    firmware_regeneration:
      allowed: true
      effect:
      - old_device_secret_revoked
      - new_device_secret_generated
      - new_table_specific_firmware_generated
    rules:
    - Device setup MUST be optional for operations activation.
    - Tenant setup console MUST allow creating tables with or without ESP32 QR display
      device support.
    - When has_qr_device=true, system MUST generate table-specific firmware.
    - When has_qr_device=false, table MUST support staff PDA ordering only and MUST
      NOT support customer self-ordering through table QR.
    - Firmware artifact MUST be treated as a secret.
    - Firmware download MUST be limited to tenant_owner and tenant_admin.
    - Firmware regeneration MUST revoke the old device secret.
    - Pairing-code-based setup MUST NOT be the primary device setup model in the initial
      product version.
  setup_steps:
  - id: business_profile
    required: true
    purpose: Capture tenant public and operational business identity.
    required_fields:
    - business_display_name
    - business_type
    - default_currency
    - default_timezone
    optional_fields:
    - business_legal_name
    - phone
    - address
    - logo
    defaults:
      business_type: cafe
      default_currency: TRY
      default_timezone: Europe/Istanbul
  - id: operating_defaults
    required: true
    purpose: Define baseline operational defaults.
    required_fields:
    - default_service_mode
    - default_tax_display_mode
    optional_fields:
    - opening_hours
    - service_charge
    defaults:
      default_service_mode: dine_in
      default_tax_display_mode: tax_included
  - id: tables
    required: true
    purpose: Define customer-facing operational tables and optionally generate table-specific
      ESP32 firmware.
    required_minimums:
      active_operational_tables: 1
    seeded_defaults:
    - '000'
    - '999'
    rules:
    - Tenant MUST create at least one operational table besides default test tables.
    - table_number MUST be unique within the tenant.
    - Table creation MUST capture has_qr_device.
    - When has_qr_device=true, table-specific firmware MUST be generated.
  - id: stations
    required: true
    purpose: Define fulfillment stations.
    required_minimums:
      active_stations: 1
    seeded_defaults:
    - MAIN
    rules:
    - Default MAIN station MUST be available before menu item creation.
    - Tenant MAY add additional stations.
  - id: menu_categories
    required: true
    purpose: Define menu grouping.
    required_minimums:
      active_menu_categories: 1
    rules:
    - Tenant MUST create at least one active menu category before operations activation.
  - id: menu_items
    required: true
    purpose: Define orderable products and station routing.
    required_minimums:
      active_orderable_menu_items: 1
    rules:
    - Every orderable menu item MUST have a price.
    - Every orderable menu item MUST have an image.
    - Every orderable menu item MUST have station routing.
    - Variants and modifiers MUST NOT be configured in the initial product version.
  - id: staff_users
    required: false
    purpose: Optionally invite tenant staff users using common presets and fixed role
      dropdowns.
    rules:
    - Staff setup MUST be skippable.
    - Common staff presets MUST be available.
    - Role selection MUST be dropdown-based and limited to fixed tenant roles.
  - id: devices
    required: false
    purpose: Review table QR device status and download or regenerate table-specific
      ESP32 firmware.
    rules:
    - ESP32 device setup MUST NOT be required for tenant operations activation.
    - Device setup MUST use table-specific firmware generation as the primary model.
    - Device firmware MAY be downloaded after operations activation by authorized
      roles.
  - id: review_and_activate_operations
    required: true
    purpose: Validate setup gates and activate tenant operations.
  default_seed_tables:
    created_for_every_tenant: true
    source: tenant_provisioning_seed
    tables:
    - table_number: '000'
      table_code: '000'
      name: Test Table 000
      type: system_test
      operational_use: false
      customer_production_use_allowed: false
      has_qr_device: false
      purpose:
      - internal_testing
      - review
      - showcase
      - user_acceptance_testing
      rules:
      - Table 000 MUST be created automatically for every tenant.
      - Table 000 MUST be clearly marked as a non-production test table.
      - Table 000 MUST NOT count toward the required minimum active operational table
        gate.
    - table_number: '999'
      table_code: '999'
      name: Test Table 999
      type: system_test
      operational_use: false
      customer_production_use_allowed: false
      has_qr_device: false
      purpose:
      - internal_testing
      - review
      - showcase
      - user_acceptance_testing
      rules:
      - Table 999 MUST be created automatically for every tenant.
      - Table 999 MUST be clearly marked as a non-production test table.
      - Table 999 MUST NOT count toward the required minimum active operational table
        gate.
    global_rules:
    - Every tenant MUST receive table 000 and table 999 during tenant provisioning.
    - Default test tables MUST be usable for test, review, showcase, and user acceptance
      testing flows.
    - Default test tables MUST be visually distinguishable from production operational
      tables in tenant UI.
    - Default test tables MUST NOT satisfy the minimum operational table requirement.
    - Default test tables MUST NOT be deleted by tenant users.
    - Default test tables MAY be disabled for customer-facing production routes only
      if testing routes remain available to authorized tenant users.
    - Default test tables MUST be created without ESP32 QR display devices by default.
  operations_activation_gates:
    required_before_activation:
    - business_profile_completed
    - operating_defaults_completed
    - at_least_one_active_operational_table_created
    - at_least_one_active_station_created
    - at_least_one_active_menu_category_created
    - at_least_one_active_orderable_menu_item_created
    - every_orderable_menu_item_has_price
    - every_orderable_menu_item_has_image
    - every_orderable_menu_item_has_station_routing
    - tenant_owner_activation_completed
    optional_before_activation:
    - staff_users_invited
    - esp32_table_firmware_downloaded
    - opening_hours_configured
    - service_charge_configured
    rules:
    - Default test tables 000 and 999 MUST NOT count as active operational tables
      for activation gates.
    - Default MAIN station MUST count as an active station for activation gates.
    - Staff users MUST NOT be required for operations activation.
    - ESP32 firmware download or device flashing MUST NOT be required for operations
      activation.
    - Operations activation MUST fail when there is no active operational table besides
      default test tables.
    - Operations activation MUST fail when no active station exists.
    - Operations activation MUST fail when no active orderable menu item exists.
    - Operations activation MUST fail when any orderable menu item lacks price.
    - Operations activation MUST fail when any orderable menu item lacks image.
    - Operations activation MUST fail when any orderable menu item lacks station routing.
  post_activation_behavior:
    tenant_operations_status: active
    setup_wizard_access_after_activation: available_as_setup_console
    dashboard_access_after_activation: true
    rules:
    - After operations activation, authorized users MAY revisit setup sections from
      tenant console.
    - Changes after activation MUST respect tenant permissions.
    - Operations activation MUST be auditable.
  forbidden_behavior:
  - tenant_operations_activation_without_business_profile
  - tenant_operations_activation_without_operational_table
  - tenant_operations_activation_counting_table_000_as_operational_table
  - tenant_operations_activation_counting_table_999_as_operational_table
  - tenant_operations_activation_without_station
  - tenant_operations_activation_without_orderable_menu_item
  - tenant_operations_activation_with_orderable_menu_item_without_price
  - tenant_operations_activation_with_orderable_menu_item_without_image
  - tenant_operations_activation_with_unrouted_orderable_menu_item
  - tenant_setup_console_using_platform_api
  - tenant_deleting_default_test_table_000
  - tenant_deleting_default_test_table_999
  - esp32_device_firmware_download_required_for_activation
  - pairing_code_primary_device_setup_in_initial_version
  - firmware_download_by_unauthorized_role
  - firmware_regeneration_without_old_secret_revocation
  - table_without_qr_device_accepting_customer_self_ordering_via_table_qr
  - tenant_initial_service_mode_delivery
  - tenant_initial_service_mode_pickup
  - tenant_initial_service_mode_takeaway
  - tax_display_mode_implying_fiscal_support
  - tenant_disabling_MAIN_station_without_another_active_station
  - duplicate_table_number_within_tenant
  - duplicate_station_code_within_tenant
  - menu_item_variants_in_initial_version
  - menu_item_modifiers_in_initial_version
  - menu_item_stock_tracking_in_initial_version
  - staff_users_required_for_operations_activation
  - tenant_owner_role_assigned_from_staff_quick_add
  - platform_role_assigned_from_tenant_staff_setup
  open_decisions: []
  done_when:
  - tenant_setup_surface_is_defined
  - guided_setup_flow_is_defined
  - business_profile_defaults_are_defined
  - operating_defaults_are_defined
  - table_model_is_defined
  - station_model_is_defined
  - default_seed_station_is_defined
  - menu_category_model_is_defined
  - menu_item_model_is_defined
  - station_routing_policy_is_defined
  - staff_setup_is_defined
  - device_setup_is_defined
  - setup_steps_are_defined
  - default_seed_tables_are_defined
  - operations_activation_gates_are_defined
  - post_activation_behavior_is_defined
  - forbidden_setup_behavior_is_defined
bill_session_api:
  purpose:
    rule: Define customer and staff bill/adisyon API contracts for bill view, staff
      bill list/detail, manual payment recording, bill close, and bill reopen.
    applies_to:
    - customer_bill_view
    - staff_bill_view
    - cashier_workspace
    - manual_payments
    - bill_close
    - bill_reopen
    - tenant_internal_api
  api_policy:
    tenant_domain_only: true
    platform_domain_allowed: false
    tenant_resolution: subdomain
    database_context: resolved_tenant_database_only
    payment_provider_processing: false
    rules:
    - Bill session APIs MUST be served only from tenant domains.
    - Bill session APIs MUST NOT be served from platform.iotables.net.
    - Bill session APIs MUST resolve exactly one tenant database from the request
      subdomain.
    - Bill session APIs MUST NOT query or mutate another tenant database.
    - Bill session APIs MUST NOT process provider payments in the initial product
      version.
    - Manual payment APIs MUST record external/offline payment events only.
  route_families:
    customer_bill: https://{tenant}.iotables.net/api/customer/bill/**
    staff_bill: https://{tenant}.iotables.net/api/internal/bills/**
    rules:
    - Customer bill endpoints MUST be scoped by active customer session and table.
    - Staff bill endpoints MUST be authenticated tenant staff endpoints.
    - Staff bill endpoints MUST enforce permissions.
  common_contract_rules:
    id_format: uuid
    timestamp_format: iso_8601_utc
    request_body_format: json
    response_body_format: json
    error_format: problem_details
    idempotency:
      required_for:
      - manual_payment_record
      - bill_close
      - bill_reopen
    rules:
    - Validation errors MUST use ProblemDetails.
    - State-changing bill endpoints MUST require idempotency keys.
    - Client-provided bill totals MUST NOT be trusted.
    - Bill totals MUST be recalculated server-side from attached order item snapshots.
  common_error_contract:
    format: problem_details
    content_type: application/problem+json
    fields:
    - type
    - title
    - status
    - detail
    - instance
    - correlationId
    - errors
    rules:
    - Every bill session API error response with a JSON body MUST use application/problem+json.
    - Validation failures MUST return 400 with field-level errors.
    - Authentication failures MUST return 401.
    - Authorization failures MUST return 403.
    - Missing resources MUST return 404.
    - Bill state conflicts and idempotency conflicts MUST return 409.
    - Unexpected failures MUST return 500 with correlationId.
  endpoints:
    customer_bill:
    - id: BSA-001
      method: GET
      path: /api/customer/bill/current
      authentication_required: true
      active_customer_session_required: true
      purpose: Return current bill/adisyon summary for the active customer session
        table.
      response: CustomerBillResponse
      rules:
      - Customer bill current MUST require active customer session.
      - Customer bill current MUST be unavailable from stale QR.
      - Customer bill current MUST only return bill data for the current session table.
      - Customer bill current MUST NOT reveal bills from another table.
      - After order submit, the customer session is offline and this endpoint requires
        a new fresh QR session.
    staff_bill:
    - id: BSA-100
      method: GET
      path: /api/internal/bills
      authentication_required: true
      required_permission: tenant.bills.view
      purpose: List bill sessions for staff/cashier views.
      query_parameters:
      - status
      - tableId
      - openedFrom
      - openedTo
      - page
      - pageSize
      response: PaginatedBillSessionSummaryResponse
      rules:
      - List bills MUST be permission protected.
      - List bills MUST use pagination.
    - id: BSA-101
      method: GET
      path: /api/internal/bills/{billSessionId}
      authentication_required: true
      required_permission: tenant.bills.view
      purpose: Return bill session detail including attached orders, order items,
        station status summary, and manual payments.
      response: BillSessionDetailResponse
      rules:
      - Bill detail MUST be permission protected.
      - Bill detail MUST return only data from the resolved tenant database.
    - id: BSA-102
      method: POST
      path: /api/internal/bills/{billSessionId}/manual-payments
      authentication_required: true
      required_permission: tenant.manual_payments.record
      purpose: Record an external/offline manual payment for a bill session.
      request: RecordManualPaymentRequest
      response: ManualPaymentResponse
      idempotency_required: true
      rules:
      - Manual payment MUST be permission protected.
      - Manual payment MUST NOT process provider payment charges.
      - Manual payment amount MUST be positive.
      - Initial product version MUST reject partial payments and overpayments.
      - Manual payment MUST be audited.
    - id: BSA-103
      method: POST
      path: /api/internal/bills/{billSessionId}/close
      authentication_required: true
      required_permissions:
      - tenant.bills.close
      - tenant.manual_payments.record
      purpose: Record required manual payment if provided and close a bill session
        atomically.
      request: CloseBillSessionRequest
      response: BillSessionDetailResponse
      idempotency_required: true
      rules:
      - Bill close MUST be permission protected.
      - Bill close MUST re-read and recalculate bill total server-side inside the
        transaction.
      - Bill close MUST require exactly matching manual payment total in the initial
        product version.
      - Bill close MUST reject client-provided bill totals as source of truth.
      - Bill close MUST set bill session status to closed atomically with manual payment
        record creation or validation.
      - Bill close MUST be audited.
    - id: BSA-104
      method: POST
      path: /api/internal/bills/{billSessionId}/reopen
      authentication_required: true
      required_permission: tenant.bills.reopen
      purpose: Reopen a closed bill session when no other active bill exists for the
        table.
      request: ReopenBillSessionRequest
      response: BillSessionDetailResponse
      idempotency_required: true
      rules:
      - Bill reopen MUST be permission protected.
      - Bill reopen MUST require reason.
      - Bill reopen MUST be limited to tenant_owner, tenant_admin, or tenant_manager
        through permission bundles.
      - Bill reopen MUST fail if another active bill exists for the same table.
      - Bill reopen MUST create bill_reopen_events record.
      - Bill reopen MUST be audited.
      - "Once a bill session transitions to closed, any customer order submission or cart mutation referencing this specific closed bill_session_id MUST be rejected by the backend with an HTTP 409 Conflict error (error_code: BILL_SESSION_CLOSED)."
      - "A successful bill reopen MUST transition the bill session's status back to active, allowing existing customer guest sessions associated with the table to continue submitting new orders to the reopened bill session without requiring a fresh QR scan, provided their local session token is still valid."
  request_response_contracts:
    CustomerBillResponse:
      fields:
      - bill_session_id
      - table_id
      - status
      - orders
      - items
      - subtotal_amount
      - discount_amount
      - service_charge_amount
      - tax_amount
      - total_amount
      - currency
      - server_time_utc
      forbidden_fields:
      - other_table_bills
      - staff_notes
      - manual_payment_internal_notes
    PaginatedBillSessionSummaryResponse:
      fields:
      - items
      - page
      - pageSize
      - totalItems
      - totalPages
    BillSessionDetailResponse:
      fields:
      - bill_session
      - table
      - attached_orders
      - order_items
      - station_status_summary
      - manual_payments
      - reopen_events
      - totals
      rules:
      - Totals MUST be server-calculated.
    RecordManualPaymentRequest:
      required:
      - amount
      - currency
      - payment_method
      optional:
      - external_reference
      - note
      allowed_payment_methods:
      - cash
      - card_external_pos
      - bank_transfer
      - other
      rules:
      - amount MUST be positive.
      - currency MUST match bill currency.
      - Request MUST NOT include payment provider charge data.
    ManualPaymentResponse:
      fields:
      - manual_payment_id
      - bill_session_id
      - amount
      - currency
      - payment_method
      - status
      - recorded_at_utc
    CloseBillSessionRequest:
      optional:
      - manual_payment
      - reason
      rules:
      - If manual_payment is provided, it MUST follow RecordManualPaymentRequest rules.
      - If an existing matching manual payment exists, close MAY use it.
      - Client-provided bill total MUST NOT be accepted.
    ReopenBillSessionRequest:
      required:
      - reason
      rules:
      - reason MUST be non-empty.
  security_and_audit:
    audit_required_for:
    - manual_payment_recorded
    - bill_close_started
    - bill_closed
    - bill_reopened
    security_rules:
    - Customer bill view MUST be scoped to active customer session table.
    - Staff bill APIs MUST be permission protected.
    - Manual payment records MUST not imply IoTable processed payment provider charges.
    - Client totals MUST never be trusted.
    - Bill close and reopen MUST be idempotent and audited.
  forbidden_behavior:
  - bill_session_api_on_platform_domain
  - bill_session_api_cross_tenant_query
  - customer_bill_view_from_stale_qr
  - customer_bill_view_for_other_table
  - staff_bill_view_without_permission
  - manual_payment_without_permission
  - manual_payment_provider_charge_initial_version
  - bill_close_without_permission
  - bill_close_trusting_client_total
  - bill_close_without_matching_manual_payment_initial_version
  - partial_payment_initial_version
  - overpayment_initial_version
  - bill_reopen_without_permission
  - bill_reopen_without_reason
  - bill_reopen_when_another_active_bill_exists
  open_decisions: []
  done_when:
  - bill_session_api_policy_is_defined
  - route_families_are_defined
  - common_contract_rules_are_defined
  - customer_bill_endpoint_is_defined
  - staff_bill_list_endpoint_is_defined
  - staff_bill_detail_endpoint_is_defined
  - manual_payment_endpoint_is_defined
  - bill_close_endpoint_is_defined
  - bill_reopen_endpoint_is_defined
  - request_response_contracts_are_defined
  - security_and_audit_rules_are_defined
  - forbidden_bill_session_api_behavior_is_defined
customer_order_api:
  purpose:
    rule: Define customer-facing tenant API contracts for public menu access, fresh
      QR session join, customer session extension, bill view, cart read/mutation,
      and order submission.
    applies_to:
    - customer_menu_routes
    - customer_qr_access
    - customer_sessions
    - customer_cart
    - customer_order_submit
    - bill_view
    - tenant_customer_api
  api_policy:
    route_root: https://{tenant}.iotables.net/api/customer
    tenant_domain_only: true
    platform_domain_allowed: false
    tenant_resolution: subdomain
    database_context: resolved_tenant_database_only
    customer_login_required: false
    customer_phone_required: false
    session_transport: http_only_secure_cookie
    post_submit_customer_order_status_endpoint: false
    rules:
    - Customer order API MUST be served only from tenant domains.
    - Customer order API MUST NOT be served from platform.iotables.net.
    - Customer order API MUST resolve exactly one tenant database from the request
      subdomain.
    - Customer order API MUST NOT query or mutate another tenant database.
    - Customer ordering MUST NOT require customer login in the initial product version.
    - Customer ordering MUST NOT require phone number in the initial product version.
    - Customer session token MUST be transported using HttpOnly Secure cookie.
    - Customer session token MUST NOT be stored in localStorage.
    - Initial product version MUST NOT expose customer order status lookup after submit,
      because successful submit moves the customer session offline.
  access_policy:
    stale_qr_allowed_for:
    - public_menu
    fresh_qr_required_for:
    - session_join
    active_customer_session_required_for:
    - session_current
    - session_extend
    - bill_view
    - cart_read
    - cart_mutation
    - order_submit
    post_submit_access:
      session_status: offline
      customer_order_status_lookup_allowed: false
      bill_or_adisyon_reaccess_requires_new_fresh_qr: true
    rules:
    - Public menu endpoint MUST allow stale QR access.
    - Public menu endpoint MUST NOT reveal active bill/adisyon state.
    - Public menu endpoint MUST NOT reveal cart or session state.
    - Session join endpoint MUST require fresh QR token.
    - Bill view, cart read, cart mutation, and order submit MUST require active customer
      session.
    - After successful order submit, the customer session MUST be offline and customer
      API order status lookup MUST NOT be available.
    - Viewing bill/adisyon after submit MUST require joining again with a fresh QR.
  common_contract_rules:
    id_format: uuid
    timestamp_format: iso_8601_utc
    request_body_format: json
    response_body_format: json
    error_format: problem_details
    idempotency:
      required_for:
      - session_join
      - session_extend
      - cart_item_add
      - cart_item_update
      - cart_item_delete
      - order_submit
    rules:
    - Validation errors MUST use ProblemDetails.
    - Mutation endpoints MUST support idempotency where listed.
    - Order submit MUST be idempotent.
    - Cart mutations MUST be idempotent to avoid duplicate items from network retries.
    - Customer session cookies MUST use HttpOnly, Secure, and SameSite=Lax or stricter.
  common_error_contract:
    format: problem_details
    content_type: application/problem+json
    fields:
    - type
    - title
    - status
    - detail
    - instance
    - correlationId
    - errors
    rules:
    - Every customer order API error response with a JSON body MUST use application/problem+json.
    - Validation failures MUST return 400 with field-level errors.
    - Missing or expired customer session failures MUST return 401.
    - Forbidden customer access failures MUST return 403.
    - Missing resources MUST return 404.
    - Stale or consumed QR token failures MUST return 409.
    - State conflicts and idempotency conflicts MUST return 409.
    - Unexpected failures MUST return 500 with correlationId.
  endpoints:
    public_menu:
    - id: COA-001
      method: GET
      path: /menu
      authentication_required: false
      stale_qr_allowed: true
      active_customer_session_required: false
      purpose: Return public active menu for a tenant/table context without exposing
        bill, cart, or session state.
      query_parameters:
      - qr
      response: PublicMenuResponse
      rules:
      - Menu endpoint MAY accept stale QR.
      - Menu endpoint MUST return only active categories and active visible menu items.
      - Menu endpoint MUST NOT reveal whether an active bill exists.
      - Menu endpoint MUST NOT return cart contents.
      - Menu endpoint MUST NOT create customer session.
    sessions:
    - id: COA-100
      method: POST
      path: /sessions/join
      authentication_required: false
      fresh_qr_required: true
      purpose: Join or create a customer session using a fresh QR token.
      request: JoinCustomerSessionRequest
      response: JoinCustomerSessionResponse
      idempotency_required: true
      sets_cookie: customer_session
      rules:
      - Session join MUST require fresh QR token.
      - Session join MUST validate token hash in resolved tenant database.
      - Session join MUST consume the fresh QR token.
      - Session join MUST rotate table QR after successful consume.
      - Session join MUST create an active customer session with 10 minute initial
        TTL.
      - Session join MUST create one active cart for the session.
      - Session join MUST set customer session through HttpOnly Secure cookie.
    - id: COA-101
      method: POST
      path: /sessions/extend
      authentication_required: true
      active_customer_session_required: true
      purpose: Extend an active customer session by explicit user-visible action within
        extension limits.
      request: ExtendCustomerSessionRequest
      response: CustomerSessionResponse
      idempotency_required: true
      rules:
      - Session extension MUST require active customer session.
      - Session extension MUST require explicit user-visible action.
      - Session extension MUST NOT require scanning a new fresh QR.
      - Session extension MUST add at most 10 minutes.
      - Session extension MUST fail after 3 extensions or 40 minutes total lifetime.
    - id: COA-102
      method: GET
      path: /sessions/current
      authentication_required: true
      active_customer_session_required: true
      purpose: Return the current active customer session state and remaining lifetime.
      response: CustomerSessionResponse
      rules:
      - Current session endpoint MUST require active customer session.
      - Current session endpoint MUST NOT revive expired or offline sessions.
    bill:
    - id: COA-200
      method: GET
      path: /bill/current
      authentication_required: true
      active_customer_session_required: true
      purpose: Return current bill/adisyon summary visible to an active customer session.
      response: CustomerBillResponse
      rules:
      - Bill view MUST require active customer session.
      - Bill view MUST NOT be available from stale QR.
      - Bill view MUST return only bill data for the session table in the resolved
        tenant database.
    cart:
    - id: COA-300
      method: GET
      path: /cart
      authentication_required: true
      active_customer_session_required: true
      purpose: Return current customer cart.
      response: CustomerCartResponse
      rules:
      - Cart read MUST require active customer session.
    - id: COA-301
      method: POST
      path: /cart/items
      authentication_required: true
      active_customer_session_required: true
      purpose: Add an orderable menu item to the current customer cart.
      request: AddCustomerCartItemRequest
      response: CustomerCartResponse
      idempotency_required: true
      rules:
      - Add cart item MUST require active customer session.
      - Add cart item MUST reject inactive or non-orderable menu items.
      - Add cart item MUST snapshot current item name, price, currency, and station
        routing.
    - id: COA-302
      method: PATCH
      path: /cart/items/{cartItemId}
      authentication_required: true
      active_customer_session_required: true
      purpose: Update quantity or note for a current cart item.
      request: UpdateCustomerCartItemRequest
      response: CustomerCartResponse
      idempotency_required: true
      rules:
      - Cart item update MUST require active customer session.
      - Cart item update MUST only affect the current session cart.
      - Quantity MUST remain positive.
    - id: COA-303
      method: DELETE
      path: /cart/items/{cartItemId}
      authentication_required: true
      active_customer_session_required: true
      purpose: Remove an item from the current customer cart.
      response: CustomerCartResponse
      idempotency_required: true
      rules:
      - Cart item delete MUST require active customer session.
      - Cart item delete MUST only affect the current session cart.
    orders:
    - id: COA-400
      method: POST
      path: /orders/submit
      authentication_required: true
      active_customer_session_required: true
      purpose: Submit the current customer cart as exactly one order and move the
        customer session offline.
      request: SubmitCustomerOrderRequest
      response: SubmitCustomerOrderResponse
      idempotency_required: true
      clears_or_locks_cart: true
      moves_session_offline: true
      rules:
      - Order submit MUST require active customer session.
      - Order submit MUST require non-empty cart.
      - Order submit MUST revalidate current price and station routing for all cart
        items.
      - Order submit MUST create exactly one order.
      - Order submit MUST create order items and station tickets grouped by station.
      - Order submit MUST lock or submit the cart.
      - Order submit MUST move the customer session offline immediately after success.
      - Order submit MUST be atomic.
      - Submit response MUST be the only customer-visible order confirmation in the
        initial product version.
  request_response_contracts:
    JoinCustomerSessionRequest:
      required:
      - qr_token
      rules:
      - qr_token plaintext MUST NOT be logged.
    JoinCustomerSessionResponse:
      fields:
      - session_id
      - table_id
      - expires_at_utc
      - extension_count
      - max_extensions
      - max_expires_at_utc
      - cart
      cookie:
        name: customer_session
        http_only: true
        secure: true
        same_site: Lax_or_Stricter
    CustomerSessionResponse:
      fields:
      - session_id
      - table_id
      - status
      - expires_at_utc
      - extension_count
      - max_extensions
      - max_expires_at_utc
      - server_time_utc
    PublicMenuResponse:
      fields:
      - tenant_display_name
      - table_display_name
      - categories
      - items
      forbidden_fields:
      - bill_exists
      - bill_total
      - cart
      - customer_session
      - active_order_count
    AddCustomerCartItemRequest:
      required:
      - menu_item_id
      - quantity
      optional:
      - note
      rules:
      - quantity MUST be positive.
    UpdateCustomerCartItemRequest:
      optional:
      - quantity
      - note
      rules:
      - At least one mutable field MUST be present.
      - quantity MUST be positive when provided.
    SubmitCustomerOrderRequest:
      optional:
      - client_note
      rules:
      - Request MUST NOT include trusted price totals.
      - Server MUST calculate all totals.
    SubmitCustomerOrderResponse:
      fields:
      - order_id
      - order_number
      - status
      - submitted_at_utc
      - total_amount
      - currency
      - station_ticket_count
      - session_status
      fixed_values:
        session_status: offline
  security_and_audit:
    security_rules:
    - QR token plaintext MUST NOT be logged.
    - Customer session cookie MUST be HttpOnly and Secure.
    - Customer session cookie MUST NOT be accessible to browser JavaScript.
    - Order submit MUST not trust client-side totals or prices.
    - All customer operations MUST execute only inside the resolved tenant database.
    audit_or_event_required_for:
    - fresh_qr_consumed
    - customer_session_joined
    - customer_session_extended
    - customer_order_submitted
    - customer_session_moved_offline
  forbidden_behavior:
  - customer_order_api_on_platform_domain
  - customer_order_api_cross_tenant_query
  - customer_session_token_in_local_storage
  - customer_session_cookie_without_http_only
  - customer_session_cookie_without_secure
  - stale_qr_session_join
  - stale_qr_bill_view
  - stale_qr_cart_mutation
  - stale_qr_order_submit
  - public_menu_revealing_bill_state
  - cart_mutation_without_active_customer_session
  - order_submit_without_active_customer_session
  - post_submit_customer_order_status_lookup_initial_version
  - order_submit_without_idempotency
  - cart_mutation_without_idempotency
  - order_submit_trusting_client_price_or_total
  - order_submit_without_price_revalidation
  - order_submit_without_station_routing_revalidation
  - customer_login_required_initial_version
  - customer_phone_required_initial_version
  open_decisions: []
  done_when:
  - customer_order_api_policy_is_defined
  - customer_access_policy_is_defined
  - common_contract_rules_are_defined
  - public_menu_endpoint_is_defined
  - session_join_endpoint_is_defined
  - session_extend_endpoint_is_defined
  - session_current_endpoint_is_defined
  - bill_current_endpoint_is_defined
  - cart_read_endpoint_is_defined
  - cart_mutation_endpoints_are_defined
  - order_submit_endpoint_is_defined
  - request_response_contracts_are_defined
  - security_and_audit_rules_are_defined
  - forbidden_customer_order_api_behavior_is_defined
platform_api:
  purpose:
    rule: Define the platform API contract surface for tenant lifecycle, provisioning,
      schema jobs, platform jobs, audit, settings, and health.
    audience:
    - platform_owner
    - llm_coding_agent
    base_path: /api/platform
  api_policy:
    authentication_required: true
    authorization: platform_owner_only
    response_format: json
    error_format: problem_details
    pagination_required_for_lists: true
    idempotency_required_for_mutations: true
    audit_required_for_state_changes: true
    command_style_mutations: true
    rules:
    - Every platform API endpoint MUST require authenticated platform_owner access.
    - List endpoints MUST support pagination.
    - State-changing endpoints MUST require idempotency keys.
    - State-changing endpoints MUST create platform audit records when the operation
      succeeds or fails after validation starts.
    - Command-style state changes MUST use POST endpoints with explicit command names.
    - Platform API MUST NOT expose tenant operational workflows.
    - Platform API MUST NOT directly activate tenant operations.
  common_headers:
    request:
      required_for_mutations:
      - name: Idempotency-Key
        type: string
        required: true
        applies_to: state_changing_requests
      optional:
      - name: X-Correlation-Id
        type: string
        required: false
        applies_to: all_requests
    response:
      required:
      - name: X-Correlation-Id
        type: string
        applies_to: all_responses
  common_error_contract:
    format: problem_details
    content_type: application/problem+json
    fields:
    - type
    - title
    - status
    - detail
    - instance
    - correlationId
    - errors
    rules:
    - Validation failures MUST return 400 with field-level errors.
    - Authentication failures MUST return 401.
    - Authorization failures MUST return 403.
    - Missing resources MUST return 404.
    - State conflicts MUST return 409.
    - Idempotency conflicts MUST return 409.
    - Unexpected failures MUST return 500 with correlationId.
  pagination_contract:
    query_parameters:
      page:
        type: integer
        minimum: 1
        default: 1
      pageSize:
        type: integer
        minimum: 1
        maximum: 100
        default: 25
    response_fields:
    - items
    - page
    - pageSize
    - totalItems
    - totalPages
    rules:
    - List responses MUST use the standard pagination response shape.
    - pageSize MUST NOT exceed 100.
  endpoint_groups:
    tenants:
      base_path: /api/platform/tenants
      endpoints:
      - id: list_tenants
        method: GET
        path: /api/platform/tenants
        purpose: List tenants with lifecycle, domain, provisioning, and tenant operations
          activation summary.
        query:
        - status
        - search
        - page
        - pageSize
        response: PaginatedTenantSummaryResponse
        audit: false
      - id: create_tenant
        method: POST
        path: /api/platform/tenants
        purpose: Create a tenant lifecycle record and start provisioning.
        request: CreateTenantRequest
        response: TenantDetailResponse
        idempotency_required: true
        audit_events:
        - tenant_created
        - tenant_creation_failed
        rules:
        - Tenant creation MUST create platform lifecycle metadata and start provisioning.
        - Tenant creation MUST NOT mark tenant operations active.
        - Tenant slug MUST be provided by platform_owner and MUST be immutable after
          creation.
      - id: validate_tenant_domain
        method: GET
        path: /api/platform/tenants/validate-domain
        purpose: Validate a tenant domain for Caddy On-Demand TLS SSL provisioning.
        query:
        - domain
        response: ValidateDomainResponse
        authentication_required: false
        audit: false
        rules:
        - Validate domain MUST return 200 OK with valid=true if the domain is registered and active.
        - Validate domain MUST return 404 Not Found or valid=false if the domain is not registered.
        - This endpoint MUST be fast (low latency) and accessible from localhost without credentials.
      - id: get_tenant
        method: GET
        path: /api/platform/tenants/{tenantId}
        purpose: Get tenant detail for platform inspection.
        response: TenantDetailResponse
        audit: false
      - id: suspend_tenant
        method: POST
        path: /api/platform/tenants/{tenantId}/suspend
        purpose: Suspend an active tenant.
        request: ReasonCommandRequest
        response: TenantDetailResponse
        idempotency_required: true
        audit_events:
        - tenant_suspended
      - id: reactivate_tenant
        method: POST
        path: /api/platform/tenants/{tenantId}/reactivate
        purpose: Reactivate a suspended tenant when eligible.
        request: ReasonCommandRequest
        response: TenantDetailResponse
        idempotency_required: true
        audit_events:
        - tenant_reactivated
        rules:
        - Only suspended tenants MAY be reactivated in the initial product version.
        - Deactivated tenants MUST NOT be reactivated in the initial product version.
      - id: deactivate_tenant
        method: POST
        path: /api/platform/tenants/{tenantId}/deactivate
        purpose: Deactivate a tenant as a terminal lifecycle action for the initial
          product version.
        request: ReasonCommandRequest
        response: TenantDetailResponse
        idempotency_required: true
        audit_events:
        - tenant_deactivated
    tenant_provisioning:
      base_path: /api/platform/tenants/{tenantId}/provisioning
      endpoints:
      - id: get_tenant_provisioning
        method: GET
        path: /api/platform/tenants/{tenantId}/provisioning
        purpose: Get latest provisioning status for one tenant.
        response: TenantProvisioningResponse
        audit: false
      - id: retry_tenant_provisioning
        method: POST
        path: /api/platform/tenants/{tenantId}/provisioning/retry
        purpose: Retry failed provisioning idempotently without destructive automatic
          cleanup.
        request: ReasonCommandRequest
        response: TenantProvisioningResponse
        idempotency_required: true
        audit_events:
        - tenant_provisioning_retry_requested
        - tenant_provisioning_retry_started
        rules:
        - Retry MUST be allowed only when tenant lifecycle status is provisioning_failed.
        - Retry MUST NOT drop an existing tenant database automatically.
        - Retry MUST recheck already-created resources before creating missing resources.
    tenant_schema_jobs:
      base_path: /api/platform/tenants/{tenantId}
      endpoints:
      - id: get_tenant_database
        method: GET
        path: /api/platform/tenants/{tenantId}/database
        purpose: Get tenant database registry, health, and schema state.
        response: TenantDatabaseResponse
        audit: false
      - id: list_tenant_schema_jobs
        method: GET
        path: /api/platform/tenants/{tenantId}/schema-jobs
        purpose: List schema jobs for one tenant.
        query:
        - status
        - page
        - pageSize
        response: PaginatedJobSummaryResponse
        audit: false
      - id: create_tenant_schema_job
        method: POST
        path: /api/platform/tenants/{tenantId}/schema-jobs
        purpose: Start a tenant schema check or schema update job.
        request: CreateSchemaJobRequest
        response: JobDetailResponse
        idempotency_required: true
        audit_events:
        - tenant_schema_job_started
    platform_jobs:
      base_path: /api/platform/jobs
      endpoints:
      - id: list_platform_jobs
        method: GET
        path: /api/platform/jobs
        purpose: List platform jobs across provisioning and schema change jobs.
        query:
        - type
        - status
        - tenantId
        - page
        - pageSize
        response: PaginatedJobSummaryResponse
        audit: false
      - id: get_platform_job
